basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Janjgir Champa (WCD Janjgir Champa) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Various Contractual. Candidates with Post Graduate, 10th, 8th, Graduate Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 19-05-2026, and closes on 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through WCD Janjgir Champa official website.
